prompt: Create an authentic daily-life photographic medium-full portrait of a young East Asian woman in her early 20s sitting alone on a soft grass lawn in a city park during an overcast afternoon. Shoot from a low ground-level angle, slightly to her side, with a shallow depth of field and natural candid composition. She has long, naturally straight black hair parted loosely and falling past her shoulders, with a few stray strands around her neck and collarbone; her face is completely covered by a flat opaque square censor block in a warm medium-brown skin-tone color. She wears a fitted long-sleeve ribbed cream knit top tucked into loose high-waisted wide-leg trousers in muted sage green. She sits with her knees drawn slightly to one side, one hand resting on the grass for support, and an open small book lying across her lap as if she is quietly reading. The background shows a calm urban park with green grass, mature trees, and a faint blurred pathway, all softly out of focus. Use cool green-gray overcast daylight, gentle even illumination, minimal hard shadows, realistic fabric texture, natural skin and hair detail, subdued colors, documentary realism, 35mm-style candid photography, vertical 2:3 framing.
